name: Al Zabir
desc: Working on Flutter app development projects, currently learning Python & AI/ML. Looking to collaborate on open-source & real-world apps.
aboutDesc: Hi, I’m Al Zabir. I am a Flutter developer and web designer focused on building simple, clean, and useful mobile apps, websites, and on-device applications. I work with Flutter, Python, and AI/ML. I enjoy turning ideas into real, working applications through code and practical implementation.
